title: gomphocarpus macer
intro: Gomphocarpus macer, also known as the balon or balloon plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gomphocarpus macer include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, or it is made into a powder and used in capsules or as a topical cream.
